Crot-h..personality: A deeply prostrated, besotted individual who appears intoxicated and sluggish, with slow passive movements and a tendency toward mental confusion. They are highly sensitive to their surroundings, easily irritated by the slightest annoyance, and may crave intoxicating drinks with an inability to resist the craving.
Crot-h..mental_state: The mind is clouded with a low, passive delirium characterized by mumbling, stumbling over words, and clumsy loquacity rather than wild excitement. Cognitive function is markedly impaired — they cannot add figures, make mistakes in writing, transpose letters and sentences, and are unable to manage their own affairs. Suspicion of friends develops alongside an inability to reason on a rational basis.
Crot-h..emotional_pattern: A pervasive melancholy dominates, with thoughts dwelling continually on death, accompanied by timidity and deep-seated fear. They are excessively sensitive, easily moved to tears by reading, yet paradoxically cross and infuriated by the least annoyance. An underlying anxious pallor with cold sweat alternates with periods of irritability and emotional volatility.
